{{Infobox character
| name = Child of Nakothi
| aliases = Child of Nakothi (creature)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Children of Nakothi]] are monstrous, mindless entities born from the intersection of human remains and the power of the [[Great Elder]] known as [[Nakothi]], or the [[Dead Mother]]. These creatures are formed when her influence embeds itself into corpses, transforming them into specialized workers or hideous abominations. While they are composed of stolen human parts, their physical forms vary wildly; some appear as blobs of blubber or fused masses of flesh, while others possess titanic proportions with tentacles or shifting, pulpy heads. They are driven by a simple, focused intellect and an insatiable hunger for blood. These creatures inhabit the warped [[island]] where [[Nakothi]]'s corpse fell following her defeat. They are summoned to battle by their [[Handmaiden]], a massive figure that towers over the [[island]]'s trees. The [[Children]] act as drones or minions, swarming enemies and seeking to consume them. Though they are considered useless by some due to their lack of wisdom, they remain a significant threat, capable of surrounding and overwhelming opponents. In some instances, their existence is tied to the [[Heart of Nakothi]], which can turn ancient bodies into these creatures.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Child of Nakothi]] screamed like a man being tortured.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Child of Nakothi]] is a horrific mouth that can swallow a man like a net and digest him over days.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Children of Nakothi]] are creatures found in the broken arena.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Child of Nakothi]] is a headless, pale-skinned, shaved gorilla.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Child of Nakothi]] is a fused monstrosity that spurts foul-smelling milky blood.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Child of Nakothi]] attacked [[Shera]] in the [[arena]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Child of Nakothi]] is an ancestral enemy of [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
